titleStmt.title: SII 25.221: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 221. (A.R. No. 221 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the first prākāra of the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

It records an order (ōlai) issued by Rājanārāyaṇa Viḻupparaiyaṉ of Paṉaiyūr granting 900 kuḻi of the dēvadāṉa lands of the god Tiruvuśāttāṉamuḍaiya-nāyaṉār called Buvaṉaikavīraṉ-tiruttōppu, obtained as kuḍinīṅgādēvadāṉa for the establishment of a maṇḍapa in order to conduct the festivals to the deity. An amount of ten paṇam accrued annually as mēlvāram from out of the crops like coconut, etc., raised in the above grove was endowed to meet the expenses of tiruppāvāḍai festival in the month of Tai. The balance of mēlvāram was allotted to meet the services (tiruppaṇi) of the deity.
This was caused to be engraved in the tirumāḷigai (temple).
The order (ōlai) was attested by Uyyavandāṉ Ambalattāḍi of Paṉaiyūr. At the instance of Piḷḷai Rājanārāyaṇa-Viḻupparaiyar, Nārāyaṇaṉ Yōgappanmar of Tirupperundurai drafted the order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī paṉaiyūruṭaiyarāṉaRead as ‘rā’canārāyaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Olai . Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya
nāyaṉār koyilttāṉattār kaṇṭu Innāyaṉār tevatāṉattu nāṉ kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉamāka
kkoṇṭu puvaṉekaviraṉ tiruttoppu kuThis letter represents the land measure ‘kuḻi’Ikkuḻi toḷāyiramum Innāyaṉārkku tirunāḷkaḷi
l Eṟiyaruḷa maṇṭapamum tiruttoppum ceytu śrīcuntara pāṇṭiya tevaṟku Iraṇṭāvatu mutal
I cila kiḻppayirum ceytu teṅku palā Uḷḷiṭ maraṅkaḷ ceytukoḷḷa vaṭakiḻ payiril
coma kuṭivāram nikki melvāram kaṟiyamutu viñcaṉattukku Uṭalākak koḷḷavuṅ tiruttaip pūcattukku muta
lāvatu mutal nāṉ tiruppāvāṭai Innāyaṉāṟku Amutu ceyvittup potukaṟ Itukku Ittiruttoppāl kiḻpaya
ril melvāra mutalilum teṅkupalāvum camaintāl Itil paṇṭam mutalaṭaṅkak koṇṭu Ivvaṭa
lile Āṭṭaikku pattākavanta paṇam tiruppāvāṭaik kuṭalākak koḷḷavum nikkiuḷḷa mutal Innāyaṉār tiruppaṇikku
ṭalāka koḷḷap paṇṇavum Ippaṭikku tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭikkoḷḷavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭikku Ivai paṉai
yūruṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉ Ampalattāṭi ĀṉaḷuRead as ‘rā’canārāyaṇa viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Itu piḷḷaiRead as ‘rā’canārāyaṇa viḻuppa
raiyar tiruviḷḷammāka Ivvolai Eḻutiṉeṉ tirupperuntuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉ Iyokap ponmar Eḻuttu svastiśrī
Digital edition of SII 25.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
